description: Full per-tick carrier-phase dTEC time series at ~1-second resolution. Each record is one carrier-phase sample within a minute window. Preserves scintillation-scale and TID-scale ionospheric dynamics discarded by the per-minute summary (l3_dtec_v1).

fields.name: timestamp_utc
fields.description: UTC timestamp of this carrier-phase sample

fields.name: minute_boundary
fields.description: Unix epoch of the parent minute boundary

fields.name: dtec_rate_tecu_per_s
fields.description: Instantaneous dTEC/dt at this sample from carrier-phase Doppler

fields.name: dtec_tecu
fields.description: Integrated dTEC at this sample (anchored if is_anchored=True, else relative to minute start)

fields.name: is_anchored
fields.description: Whether dtec_tecu is anchored to group-delay absolute TEC

fields.name: anchor_status
fields.description: Anchor state: ANCHORED=group-delay TEC applied; ANCHOR_LOW_CONF=anchor suppressed (confidence<0.5); NO_ANCHOR=no group-delay TEC available

fields.name: snr_db
fields.description: Mean SNR of carrier phase measurements for this minute

quality_notes.dtec_rate_tecu_per_s: Valid regardless of anchor status. Primary science observable.
quality_notes.dtec_tecu: Absolute only when is_anchored=True. When unanchored, value is relative to minute start and drifts freely across minutes.
